name: Disney Baby Mickey Mouse Hello World Appliqued Throw Pillow - Navy/Gray/White
description: Mickey Mouse Hello World - Plush Decorative Pillow with message saying "Imagination Makes Dreams Come True". Complete the look of your Mickey Mouse nursery with this classic decorative pillow. Toss on a bed or rocker as a stylish accent. Our favorite Mickey Mouse peeking over the edge with a big "Hello"  in shades of navy, gray, white and black. The back of the pillow is a playful navy and white Mickey all-over print. This pillow measures 15" x 15" x 4".
